basis: Rules audit for Codex Web conversation turn grouping, including completed adjacent user turns and paged leading partial windows.

checks.name: guided user input before final answer stays in the active official turn
same turn file activity remains with the earlier visible user anchor
new official turn id promotes the intervening user message to a visible turn
adjacent completed user turns stay separate
paged windows hide incomplete leading non-user turns
standalone completed internal tool events are hidden
standalone running tools and cancelled rows remain visible
